# Vikranth Reddimasu

> ML Engineer building AI systems that scale. Open to work.

## About

Vikranth Reddimasu is an ML Engineer and Data Scientist specializing in deep learning, reinforcement learning, and production AI systems. He builds scalable ML pipelines and AI-powered applications with a focus on practical, measurable impact.

## Contact

- Email: vikranthreddimasu@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/vikranthreddimasu
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/vikranthreddimasu
- Website: https://vikranthreddimasu.xyz
- Resume: https://vikranthreddimasu.xyz/resume.pdf

## Projects

### Pac-Man AI
Five DQN (Deep Q-Network) agent variants trained to play Pac-Man using deep reinforcement learning. Implements and compares Vanilla DQN, Double DQN, Dueling DQN, DQN with Prioritized Experience Replay, and Rainbow DQN architectures.

- Tech: Python, PyTorch, NumPy, OpenCV
- GitHub: https://github.com/vikranthreddimasu/pacman-ai
- Tags: Reinforcement Learning, Deep Learning, PyTorch

## Skills

### Machine Learning & AI
PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, HuggingFace Transformers, LangChain, OpenAI API, Reinforcement Learning, Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing

### Programming Languages
Python, SQL, TypeScript, R, Bash

### Data Engineering
Pandas, NumPy, Apache Spark, Polars, Jupyter, dbt

### Frontend & Web
React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, TypeScript

### Cloud & MLOps
AWS, Docker, Git, MLflow, Weights & Biases, FastAPI

## Status

Currently open to ML Engineer, Data Scientist, and AI Engineer roles.
